expectations.text: Output explicitly mentions WENDAO_API_KEY or 携程问道 key as missing/unavailable in source health.
Output asks the user to configure the missing key or confirm degraded execution.
Output lists other sources as available/unavailable instead of silently skipping Wendao.
expectations.evidence: PASS: checked other source availability listed

expectations.text: Output does not fabricate Wendao results.
expectations.evidence: PASS: checked no fabricated Wendao results

timing.note: Subagent notifications in this environment did not include total_tokens or duration_ms, so timing/tokens are unavailable.

workarounds: Automated text-based grading; human review recommended for factual hotel accuracy.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are text-coverage checks for workflow behavior, not factual verification of hotel inventory or live pricing.
